cell_layout_csv_format.description: Plate matrix CSV. First column must be 'row_name'. Remaining columns must be numeric plate columns like 1,2,3,... Each non-empty cell value is cells_per_well. Blank cells mean unused wells.

dye_layout_csv_format.description: Plate matrix CSV. First column must be 'row_name'. Remaining columns must be numeric plate columns like 1,2,3,... Each non-empty cell value is a dye program such as CP_A or CP_B. Blank cells mean no dye program.
